sources.name: RCGP / CPRD
sources.dataset: Clinical Practice Research Datalink Menopause Consultations

metadata.methodology: HRT prescription data from NHS Business Services Authority Prescription Cost Analysis, counting all HRT product items dispensed in England. GP consultation data estimated from CPRD research database extrapolation. Women affected figures from MIMS/Menopause Society surveys.
knownIssues: HRT supply shortage in 2022 affected prescribing patterns; some prescriptions redirected to alternative formulations not captured in HRT-specific counts
GP consultation data is modelled estimate rather than administrative record
Women who use private prescriptions not captured in NHS dispensing data
